name: finalize_status
description: Called at the end of a booking conversation to set the final status of the booking. Use 'confirmed' when the booking is accepted, 'callback_required' when staff need to call back to confirm, or 'cancelled' if the caller changed their mind.

status.description: The final booking status. Use 'confirmed' if booking accepted, 'callback_required' if staff need to call back, 'cancelled' if caller cancelled.

confirmed_date.description: The confirmed appointment date and time if status is 'confirmed' (e.g. 'Tuesday 27 May at 10am').

callback_reason.description: Reason a callback is needed if status is 'callback_required' (e.g. 'check technician availability').
